residual_findings.title: reconcile_chapters path-traversal hardening (Cursor Finding 1, closed in fix wave)
residual_findings.source: Cursor security review (cursor[bot] PR #46 review 4445141566 / comment 3369398496) 2026-06-07T13:09:04Z
residual_findings.target_date: **Closed in PR #46 fix wave** (commit e40a79d, 2026-06-07T13:55 CST)
residual_findings.note: Closed by defense in depth: (1) handler validates PATCHed work_ref slug against ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{0,63}$ before joining paths; returns BadRequest on invalid; (2) reconcile_from_filesystem canonicalizes the resolved stories_dir + verifies it stays under the canonicalized <workspace_root>/Works/<work_ref>/ prefix; returns error on escape. Theoretical exploit closed. PR review thread resolved (PRRT_kwDOR6V-K86HqDti).

residual_findings.title: novel-writing finalize state llm_judge quality gate bypass (Cursor Finding 2, closed in fix wave)
residual_findings.source: Cursor security review (cursor[bot] PR #46 review 4445141566 / comment 3369398497) 2026-06-07T13:09:04Z
residual_findings.note: Closed by reestructuring the finalize state: removed the chapter_transition enter action (which prematurely flipped draft→finalized before the llm_judge ran). Added a new finalize_commit state that runs the actual transition only after the judge approves. State graph: outline_chapter → draft_chapter → finalize (judge-only) → finalize_commit (transition) → done. Preset version 3→4. All 6 affected tests updated. Quality gate no longer bypassable. PR review thread resolved (PRRT_kwDOR6V-K86HqDtj).

residual_findings.title: capability_registry test count drift (P3 novel.chapter_transition not counted; closed in fix wave)
residual_findings.target_date: **Closed in PR #46 fix wave** (commit d6b8920, 2026-06-07T13:55 CST)
residual_findings.note: Closed by renaming test registry_has_nineteen_builtins → registry_has_twenty_builtins; updating assertion left 19 → 20; updating comment to reflect P1 (18→19) + P3 (19→20) additions with hint. CI re-ran and passed (all 9 checks green).
